title: ManUtdMoon/ZPRL
abstract:
Implementation of the paper "Beyond Action Residuals: Steering Robot Manipulation Policies with Bottleneck Latent Reinforcement Learning" (https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.19919).

# Beyond Action Residuals: Steering Robot Manipulation Policies with Bottleneck Latent Reinforcement Learning (ZPRL) [Dongjie Yu](https://manutdmoon.github.io/) *,1,2 , [Kun Lei](https://lei-kun.github.io/) *,2,3 , [Zhennan Jiang](https://jzndd.github.io/) 4 , [Jia Pan](https://www.ai.hku.hk/people/academic-staff/jpan) #,1 , [Huazhe Xu](http://hxu.rocks/) #,2,5 * Equal contribution # Corresponding authors 1 School of Computing and Data Science, HKU; 2 Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute; 3 Shanghai Jiao Tong University; 4 Institute of Automation, CAS; 5 IIIS, THU **TL;DR**: ZPRL is an RL finetuning framework that perturbs bottleneck latents to steer robot manipulation policies, achieving efficient steering and smooth robot actions. ## Installation 1. Clone the repository. 2. Create a virtual environment and install the required dependencies. We used [mamba](https://github.com/conda-forge/miniforge) for fast env management, but you can also use conda. Then add `export MUJOCO_GL=egl` to your `~/.bashrc`. If osmesa/glfw/glew issues still exist during training, check this [page](https://docs.pytorch.org/rl/0.6/reference/generated/knowledge_base/MUJOCO_INSTALLATION.html) for possible solutions. 3. Check your `~/.bashrc` and locate `MAMBA_ROOT_PREFIX` or `CONDA_PREFIX`. Then add either or correspondingly to your `~/.bashrc` if there is no such command. 4. Install `robosuite` and `robomimic`. We use specific versions for both to leverage Python bindings of `mujoco` so we do not have to install `mujoco-py` and download more files. 5. We made a small patch to `robosuite` to correct its GPU rendering on the specified device and enable faster parallel simulation. Replace `/your/path/to/dependencies/robosuite/robosuite/renderers/context/egl_context.py` with [this](patches/egl_context.py) and replace `/your/path/to/dependencies/robosuite/robosuite/utils/binding_utils.py` with [this](patches/binding_utils.py). You may need to change the `conversion_map` in `egl_cont
abstract_zh: 本文提出了ZPRL，一种强化学习微调框架，通过扰动瓶颈潜在变量来引导机器人操作策略，实现了高效的策略引导和流畅的机器人动作。该框架基于论文“Beyond Action Residuals: Steering Robot Manipulation Policies with Bottleneck Latent Reinforcement Learning”实现。
tldr_zh: ZPRL通过扰动瓶颈潜在变量高效引导机器人操作策略。
cover_zh: 机器人操作策略还能这样调？扰动潜在变量就能让动作更流畅！

judge.reason: 官方实现，用瓶颈潜变量RL微调操作策略，有论文支撑，方向吻合。

>[!abstract] 一句话总结：提出ZPRL框架，使用强化学习微调瓶颈潜在表示，通过扰动潜在空间而非动作空间来引导预训练策略，实现高效策略修正。


# 一、动机

> 现有基于动作残差的方法在引导机器人策略时效率低下且动作不平滑，ZPRL旨在通过扰动瓶颈潜在变量实现高效平滑的引导。


# 二、方法

> 提出ZPRL框架，使用强化学习微调瓶颈潜在表示，通过扰动潜在空间而非动作空间来引导预训练策略，实现高效策略修正。


# 三、核心实验结果

> 具体数字未在摘要中提供，需参考论文原文；但在机器人操作任务上，ZPRL相比动作残差方法实现更高效的引导和更平滑的动作。


# 四、对我的启发

> 瓶颈潜在空间扰动为机器人策略引导提供了新思路，可能适用于其他连续控制任务；但依赖良好预训练策略，且微调计算成本需进一步优化。
